ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "province_state" TEXT /* Province or State of the region */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Country or region name */,
  "lat" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the region */,
  "long" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the region's data was updated */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the report refers to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new infections reported on that day */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total infections reported up to that date */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths reported on that day */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths reported up to that date */,
  "new_recoveries" INTEGER /* Number of new recoveries reported on that day */,
  "total_recoveries" INTEGER /* Total recoveries reported up to that date */,
  "test_count" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted on that day */,
  "positive_rate" REAL /* Percentage of positive test results */,
  "recovery_rate" REAL /* Percentage of recovered cases */,
  "fatality_rate" REAL /* Percentage of fatal cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the vaccination data corresponds to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of reporting the vaccination data */,
  "new_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Number of new vaccinations administered on that day */,
  "total_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Total vaccinations administered up to that date */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered */,
  "dose_number" INTEGER /* Dose number (1, 2, etc.) */,
  "fully_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of people fully vaccinated */,
  "partially_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of people partially vaccinated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_tracking" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the resource data corresponds to */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of healthcare resource (e.g., beds, ventilators) */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Number of available resources */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of resources available */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the resource data was updated */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the resource */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the resource (e.g., available, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_tracking_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data entry, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_guidelines" (
  "guideline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guideline */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the health guideline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the guideline */,
  "date_published" TEXT /* Date the guideline was published */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the guideline was updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the guideline */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the guideline (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guideline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outbreak_reports" (
  "outbreak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outbreak report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the outbreak occurred */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the outbreak report */,
  "affected_cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases affected in the outbreak */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the outbreak (e.g., contained, ongoing) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the outbreak report */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the outbreak */,
  "control_measures" TEXT /* Measures taken to control the outbreak */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outbreak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outbreak_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends_analysis" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend analysis entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the identified trend */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the trend analysis */,
  "source_data" TEXT /* Source of the data used for the analysis */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_analysis_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
